phases.title: Language Mastery & Database Core
phases.milestone: Build and query a complex multi-table SQL database local script
recommended_actions: Learn core language syntax (Java OOP, collections, exceptions)
Master SQL syntax (joins, indexes, transactions, execution plans)
Understand HTTP protocol (REST constraints, headers, request codes)

phases.title: Web Frameworks & API Service Integration
phases.milestone: Create a fully functional REST API service with persistence using Spring Boot
recommended_actions: Learn Spring Framework concepts (DI, IoC, Bean lifecycle)
Implement Object Relational Mapping (Hibernate/Spring Data JPA)
Implement API security foundations (Basic Auth, JWT)
Write integration and unit tests using Mockito

phases.title: Systems Scaling & Deployment
phases.milestone: Deploy a containerized backend service connected to a persistent cache and DB on a cloud environment
recommended_actions: Study message brokers for async jobs (RabbitMQ or Kafka)
Deploy to a cloud provider (AWS EC2/ECS) using IaC (Terraform)
